---
title: "PhD Students"
format: html
---

::: {.cv-entry}
**Seungyeon Lee**, University of Aberdeen  
<span class="cv-dates">2024 – Present</span>  
- Integrated population models of tawny owls.
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**James Owen**, Queen's University Belfast  
<span class="cv-dates">2025 – Present</span>  
- Geoprofiling methodology development.
:::

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
